title: Paldean Tauros (Aqua) Battle Guide
summary: A [Fighting]/[Water] physical attacker with [intimidate] — the only Paldean Tauros variant with STAB [aqua-jet] priority.
strengths: [raging-bull] is a [Water] STAB that breaks screens
STAB [aqua-jet] priority — unique to this breed
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Paldean Tauros (Aqua Breed) is the only variant with access to STAB [aqua-jet] — a priority move that makes it unique among the three breeds. The [Fighting]/[Water] typing plus [intimidate] support covers [Fire], [Rock], [Ground], [Steel], [Dark], and [Ice] threats with just two STAB moves.

## Strengths
[raging-bull] becomes a [Water] STAB with screen-breaking utility. [aqua-jet] priority is a defining advantage in doubles — it lets Aqua Breed finish weakened fast threats before they can act. [intimidate] on entry adds further tempo value.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Five weaknesses — [Electric], [Grass], [Flying], [Psychic], [Fairy] — make it susceptible to common meta attackers. 70 Special Defense folds to [thunderbolt] or [moonblast].

## Recommended Moveset
[raging-bull] is the signature STAB. [close-combat] is the [Fighting] STAB. [aqua-jet] is the breed-unique priority move. [protect] is mandatory.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the standard damage item. [mystic-water] stacks [Water] damage specifically. [intimidate] is locked. Tera [Water] boosts [raging-bull] and [aqua-jet] priority, Tera [Fighting] stacks [close-combat].

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Electric] and [Grass] with [Ground] and [Fire] partners. Handle [Psychic] and [Fairy] with [Dark] and [Steel] teammates. [tailwind] support maximizes the sweeping window.

## Play Patterns
Lead for [intimidate], click [raging-bull] against screen leads, and pressure with [close-combat] on neutral targets. Save [aqua-jet] for faster weakened threats. Switch out against [Electric] attackers immediately.
